expectations.text: Identifies the correct contrast ratio threshold (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
Suggests a tool or method to check the actual contrast ratio
expectations.evidence: Suggests WebAIM checker and Chrome DevTools accessibility panel

expectations.text: Identifies the color-only dot as a WCAG 1.4.1 violation
expectations.evidence: Identifies as WCAG 1.4.1 Level A failure

expectations.text: Provides a concrete fix for the color-only dot (adding text, icon, or label)
expectations.evidence: Suggests visible text labels and icons; mentions aria-label on wrapper

expectations.text: References specific WCAG criteria (e.g., 1.4.3 for contrast, 1.4.1 for color-only)
expectations.evidence: WCAG 1.4.3 and 1.4.1 both named; correctly identifies 1.4.1 as Level A
